scope: Prepared concise MVP handoff documentation for broker setup, provider config, protocol, clients, limitations, and optimization follow-ups.

summary.result: MVP developer documentation is now discoverable from the repository root. README.md explains build/test, broker run commands, mock and pi config, client setup entry points, protocol entry points, known limitations, and the next optimization plan. Dedicated docs cover protocol v1, client setup, limitations, and next steps.

broker_run: Minimal pi TOML config using provider=openai-codex and model=gpt-5.5
clients: VS Code local-source extension-development command and settings
limitations: pi smoke latencies 4529.306 ms and 6254.653 ms, median 5391.979 ms over n=2
default openai/gpt-5.5 path failed on the smoke host due missing OpenAI API key
real editor GUI smoke remains unproven
quality beyond synthetic examples remains unproven
client packaging and Obsidian module resolution remain open
health/source omit configured pi provider namespace
next_steps: real-editor smoke with mock then bounded pi
persistent pi/RPC or direct provider API latency reduction
privacy policy expansion before richer context

commands_run.command: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test && npm test --prefix clients && node --check clients/vscode/src/extension.js && node --check clients/obsidian/src/main.js
commands_run.result: passed; Rust workspace tests, client Node tests, and host entrypoint syntax checks all passed.

success_criteria.criterion: README lets a new developer start the broker and connect at least one client.
evidence: README.md documents broker run/curl commands and links to docs/client-setup.md.
docs/client-setup.md documents VS Code local-source extension development setup and Obsidian disposable-vault setup.

success_criteria.criterion: Protocol docs and client setup docs are discoverable.
evidence: README.md links to docs/protocol.md, docs/client-setup.md, and crates/autocomplete-protocol/README.md.

success_criteria.criterion: Known limitations and failed smoke results are explicit.
evidence: README.md and docs/limitations-and-next-steps.md record the openai/gpt-5.5 API-key failure, pi latency measurements, synthetic-only quality evidence, and missing GUI editor smoke.

safety_notes: Did not edit any file tagged human-written.
Did not read prompt-buffer.md or tmp/ files.
No feature code was changed; documentation only.
worktree_notes: Pre-existing unrelated deleted legacy reports/orchestration/* entries and untracked orchestration/skill paths were visible before this task and were not modified.
Current-task changes are limited to README/docs discoverability updates plus this handoff.

recommended_follow_ups.title: Run real editor-host smoke
recommended_follow_ups.details: Use the documented VS Code Extension Development Host and disposable Obsidian vault setup to verify GUI ghost text and Tab acceptance with mock provider, then bounded pi.

recommended_follow_ups.title: Package clients
recommended_follow_ups.details: Bundle or copy clients/protocol into VS Code and Obsidian distributions so local-source relative imports are not required after installation.

recommended_follow_ups.title: Improve pi diagnostics and latency
recommended_follow_ups.details: Report configured pi provider namespace in health/source and evaluate persistent pi/RPC, direct API, or FIM provider adapters.
